title: Research
description: Schema for pre-assessment research data gathered from public sources.

researchRunId.description: Unique identifier for this research run

companyProfileId.description: Reference to the company profile being researched

status.description: Current status of the research run

startedAt.description: Timestamp when the research run started

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the research run completed

sources.description: List of external sources consulted during research

items.description: A notable signal detected during research about the company

signals.description: Notable signals or patterns detected during research

successfulSources.description: Number of sources successfully scraped or accessed

failedSources.description: List of sources that could not be accessed

coverageScore.description: Proportion of successful sources against total attempted

coverage.description: Metrics on the breadth and depth of source coverage

agentVersion.description: Version of the research agent used

modelUsed.description: AI model used during the research run

tokensUsed.description: Number of tokens consumed during research

costEstimate.description: Estimated cost of the research run

metadata.description: Operational metadata about the research run

confidenceLevel.description: Confidence level indicating reliability of a piece of evidence

type.description: Classification of how this evidence was obtained

source.description: The origin or source of this evidence

detail.description: Detailed description of the evidence content

url.description: URL reference to the source of this evidence

confidence.description: Confidence level in this evidence item

evidenceItem.description: A single evidence item used across the Compass platform

accessedAt.description: Timestamp when the source was accessed

relevance.description: Description of why this source is relevant

sourceReference.description: Reference to an external source of information
